aluno.step1Desc: See your next session, time, and instructor. Check in with one tap!
aluno.step2Desc: Track your monthly attendance and see your trend. Try to beat your goal!
aluno.step3Desc: Watch sessions and techniques in the catalog. New videos added every week.
aluno.step4Desc: Check the ranking, achievements, and challenges. Every training counts. Oss!

instrutor.step1Desc: Here you get the full picture: classes, students, stats, and alerts.
instrutor.step2Desc: Start attendance quickly. The system detects the class by schedule automatically.
instrutor.step3Desc: Smart alerts show absences, attendance drops, and students ready for promotion.
instrutor.step4Desc: Use the timer during the session to control rounds and intervals.

responsavel.step1Desc: Track weekly attendance and see if they're on the right path.
responsavel.step2Desc: View promotions, achievements, and technical growth.
responsavel.step3Desc: Send quick messages about absences, questions, or compliments.

admin.step1Desc: Unit overview: active students, revenue, alerts, and key metrics.
admin.step2Desc: Manage students, instructors, and guardians. Advanced filters and batch actions.
admin.step3Desc: Customize classes, schedules, plans, and notifications for your unit.
admin.step4Desc: Get alerts about churn risk, overdue payments, and growth opportunities.
